title: sambucus racemosa subsp. pubens
intro: Sambucus racemosa subsp. pubens, also known as American elderberry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiviral and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Sambucus racemosa subsp. pubens include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support respiratory health and provide relief from coughs and sore throats.
